channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: A look at how some of Trump's picks to lead health agencies could help carry out Kennedy's overhaul
item.description: The team that President-elect Donald Trump has selected to lead federal health agencies in his second administration includes a retired congressman, a surgeon and a former talk-show host.
item.dc:creator: MIKE STOBBE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Israeli strikes in central Beirut kill at least 15 as diplomats push for a cease-fire
item.description: BEIRUT, Lebanon (AP) — Israeli airstrikes Saturday in central Beirut killed at least 15 people, officials said, as the once-rare attacks on the heart of Lebanon's capital continued without warning while diplomats scrambled to broker a cease-fire.
item.dc:creator: ABBY SEWELL and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Glen Powell to star in latest hit: a look-alike competition
item.description: After an appearance in "Top Gun: Maverick" and leading roles in "Anyone but You," "Hitman" and "Twisters," Austin native and Hollywood A-lister Glen Powell is set to star in his latest smash hit: A look-alike competition.
item.dc:creator: Kelsey Thompson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Israeli-Moldovan rabbi living in UAE is missing. Israeli officials fear he may have been kidnapped
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — An Israeli-Moldovan rabbi living in the United Arab Emirates has gone missing, with Israeli authorities raising the suspicion Saturday he may have been kidnapped as tensions remain high with Iran.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL and ELEANOR H. REICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Here are the most heated Thanksgiving food fights
item.description: Thanksgiving dinner may be one of the most anticipated meals of the year for many people, but it is also one of the most debated. From the correct way to prepare the turkey to the best side dishes and desserts, here are the dishes worth fighting over this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump taps NFL player Scott Turner as head of HUD
item.description: Turner serves as the chair of the Center for Education Opportunity at America First Policy Institute, a Trump-aligned think tank.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: NATO head and Trump meet in Florida for talks on global security
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — U.S. President-elect Donald Trump and the head of NATO have met for talks on global security, the military alliance said Saturday. In a brief statement, NATO said Trump and its secretary general, Mark Rutte, met on Friday in Palm Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump names Seb Gorka, Alex Wong to be senior national security staff
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped his first term alums Alex Wong and Sebastian Gorka to join his national security team for his second go-around.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation

item.title: Voters rejected historic election reforms across the US, despite more than $100M push
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Two weeks before Election Day, activists from across the country gathered for an online rally heralding the historic number of state ballot initiatives seeking to change the way people vote.
item.dc:creator: DAVID A. LIEB, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado funeral home owners who let nearly 190 bodies decay plead guilty to corpse abuse
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (AP) — The owners of a Colorado funeral home who let nearly 190 bodies decay in a room-temperature building and gave grieving families fake ashes pleaded guilty on Friday to corpse abuse.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump selects former Florida Rep. Dave Weldon to lead CDC
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump tapped former Florida Rep. Dave Weldon (R) to serve as the director for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) during his upcoming administration. "I am thrilled to announce that former Congressman, Dr.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Louisiana lawmakers pass income and corporate tax cuts, raising statewide sales tax to pay for it
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Louisiana’s GOP-dominated legislature passed tax cuts on personal and corporate income on Friday in exchange for a statewide sales tax increase, giving Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump names Chavez-DeRemer for Labor secretary
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer (R-Ore.), to serve as Labor secretary in his new administration. Chavez-DeRemer had the backing of the Teamsters before she was officially picked by Trump.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Officer kills pet dog mistaken for a coyote in Massachusetts town. The owner says it was unnecessary
item.description: An animal control officer shot and killed a pet dog in a Massachusetts town after mistaking it for a coyote in an incident that has the animal's owner fuming, but that local police are describing as a sad mix-up.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon purchase leaves Las Vegas senior couple in refund limbo, company responds
item.description: “If this happened to me, it's had to have happened to other people,” says Las Vegas senior LaRae Obenauf.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, KRON4

item.title: Driver in crash that killed 4 kids was allegedly photographing ‘Welcome to Florida’ sign
item.description: A New York man was extradited to Florida this month after he was accused of causing a deadly crash when he came to a near-stop on Interstate 95 to take photo of the "Welcome to Florida" sign.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas education board approves optional Bible-infused curriculum for elementary schools
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas’ education board voted Friday to allow Bible-infused teachings in elementary schools under optional new curriculum that could test boundaries between religion and public classrooms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN and KENDRIA LAFLEUR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 Utah children missing since 2022 found living with FLDS Church, returned to mother
item.description: Three Utah children missing for two years have been located living with members of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, according to the Fredonia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Venezuelan migrant arrested in Colorado for allegedly sexually assaulting boss' 14-year-old daughter: report
item.description: A Venezuelan migrant is accused of sexually assaulting the 14-year-old daughter of his employer while he lived in the individual's house in Colorado, police and reports say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Suspect in Young Dolph case placed on a 6 year diversion
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- The alleged mastermind behind the killing of Memphis rapper Young Dolph and the man charged with accessory after the fact faced a judge Friday morning. Hernandez Govan is facing charges of attempted and first-degree murder plus conspiracy.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Cases of 'walking pneumonia' are rising across the US: Here's where it's worst
item.description: In October, the CDC wrote that since late spring, the number of infections caused by walking pneumonia has been increasing, especially among young children.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Rousseau, KRON4

item.title: Canoeist is paddling the 6,000-mile Great Loop out of gratitude for life
item.description: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Peter Frank has paddled from Michigan's Upper Peninsula in June to the Chesapeake Bay in Maryland this month in his 1982 Sawyer Loon decked canoe, but he’s still got a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Murdered Kansas mom suffered 30 stab, cut wounds trying to defend herself: autopsy
item.description: An Oklahoma medical examiner's office has released the full autopsy report for the one of the two Kansas moms found buried in a freezer in a cow pasture earlier this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Colorado dentist's murder trial put on hold after defense 'suddenly quit' prior to jury selection
item.description: A Colorado judge has delayed the trial for an Aurora dentist accused of poisoning his wife to death after the defense attorney suddenly quit during jury selection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Illinois Supreme Court reverses actor Jussie Smollett's conviction
item.description: The Illinois Supreme Court has reversed the conviction of actor Jussie Smollett, who was found guilty of falsely reporting a 2019 hate crime, after he argued that the State's second prosecution was a due process violation.
item.dc:creator: Angelica Sanchez, KTLA 5

item.title: Pentagon 'fundamentally rejects' ICC decision to issue arrest warrant for Netanyahu
item.description: The Pentagon rejected the International Criminal Court's decision to issue arrest warrants for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prolific Mexican cartel leader allegedly faked his own death to live 'life of luxury' in California
item.description: A Mexican cartel leader, who peddled thousands of kilograms of illegal drugs to the U.S., was killed by a business associate for "lying" — or at least that's what the public was told.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Passengers duct tape unruly man who tried to open door on American Airlines plane
item.description: A group of passengers aboard a Dallas-bound flight restrained a man with duct tape after he claimed to be the "captain" and attempted to open the cabin door of an American Airlines plane midair, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KRON4

item.title: Wisconsin man who faked his own kayaking death fled the country and won't come home, officials say
item.description: Borgwardt, 45, was reported missing on Aug. 12 after he failed to return home from kayaking on Big Green Lake, the Green Lake County Sheriff’s Office said at the time.
item.dc:creator: Ben Newhouse, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US charges one of the world's richest people with fraud
item.description: Indian businessman Gautam Adani, one of the world's richest people, was charged by the U.S. on allegations of fraud.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: CMA Awards: 2024 Winners | LIST
item.description: Keep up with all the biggest winners and moments from Country Music’s Biggest Night™ at the 58th Annual CMA Awards live from Nashville, TN!
item.dc:creator: Sebastian Posey, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nearly $100 million awarded to the family of a man fatally shot in his apartment by an officer
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The family of a man shot and killed by a Dallas police officer who said she mistook his apartment for her own was awarded nearly $100 million Wednesday in a federal civil trial.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Florist gets death threats after refusing to serve Trump voters
item.description: The owner posted on social media that the business is now temporarily closed after receiving several death threats. She also made all of her social media accounts private.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Knox, Fox 5
